Title: Missing Person
Searching for [TargetName|Last]
Missing Persons Report
Missing Persons Case
Description: The family of [TargetName] is hoping to find some closure. While there is confirmation that the [Ship] [TargetName|First]were serving aboard did not survive its journey, the family wants to know for sure what happened. [Contractor] is looking for someone with tact and discretion to investigate [Location] and see if they can learn [TargetName|First]'s fate. [Timed][Danger]Your assistance in the matter is appreciated.

Recently, a [Ship] ran into some unfortunate luck and was destroyed. Since around that same time, no one has heard or seen [TargetName] and it is our current belief that they may have been aboard when the [Ship] met its fate. We are looking for a contractor to complete a survey onsite at [Location] and ascertain if [TargetName|Last] is there. [Timed][Danger]

We are in need of a contractor to locate one, [TargetName], who was last seen working aboard a [Ship] that was recently reported as destroyed. [Timed][Danger]Payment will be issued upon receiving confirmation of [TargetName|Last]'s whereabouts.

[Contractor] is currently seeking a contractor to help confirm the status of [TargetName]. According to our initial research, it is believed that [TargetName|First] was serving aboard a [Ship] that befell a tragic accident. We would require you to travel to [Location] and conduct an onsite search, so that we may determine if [TargetName|First] did indeed perish aboard and inform the parents. [Timed][Danger]

Not expecting a happy outcome on this one. [TargetName] was last heard from when they boarded a [Ship]. That same ship was reported destroyed. Now, the family wants to confirm what happened one way or the other. That's where you come in. Go, search [Location], locate [TargetName|Last] and we can hopefully give them a little peace of mind. [Timed][Danger]
Danger: We would be remiss if we did not remind you that venturing into the wreck site will potentially be hazardous, and all caution should be used.
It goes without saying, but be careful out there. We would hate for whatever or whoever happened to the [Ship] to happen to you.
It's possible that the [Ship] was the victim of foul play, so make sure to take your time and don't get sloppy. Caution is the keyword.
Timed: We would all like to see this matter closed as quickly as possible, and as such, a certain amount urgency is warranted.
We've been asked to expedite matters, and are looking to settle this ASAP.
[TargetName|First] has been missing for some time, so anything you could do to settle this as quickly as possible would be great.
